title: Invalid URL error during MP3 to AAC conversion
symptom: When attempting to convert an MP3 file to AAC using the FREE CONVERT service, the process fails with an 'INVALID URL' error.
applies_when: Attempting to convert MP3 to AAC
not_this_if: URL does not contain 'POST' at the beginning
root_cause: The error occurs because the URL used for the conversion incorrectly includes 'POST' at the beginning, which is not a valid format for the service's API endpoint.
fix_steps: Locate the URL used in the conversion service settings
Remove 'POST' from the beginning of the URL
agent_instruction: Remove 'POST' from the beginning of the URL in the FREE CONVERT service settings.
